title: Drepanocarpus monospermus
taxonomy: Drepanocarpus monospermus is a plant species that belongs to the family Pandanaceae, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. This family is commonly known as the screw pine family due to the unique screw-like inflorescence of its members. The Pandanaceae family is part of the larger order Pandanales, which also includes other plant families like the Stemonuraceae and the Triuridaceae. The classification of Drepanocarpus monospermus is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Magnoliophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Pandanales, Family: Pandanaceae, and Genus: Drepanocarpus. This classification highlights the plant's unique characteristics and relationships to other plant species within its family and order.
